message:
fix(membrane): improve Dobrushin test ergodicity and Doob drift rate semantics

Replace deterministic cycling patterns in Dobrushin contraction tests with
xorshift PRNG sequences that uniformly cover all transition types, fixing
potential flakiness. Rename tests to reflect stochastic nature. Switch Doob
drift_rate from normalized cumulative magnitude (mean|A_n|/n) to smoothed
per-step increment rate (mean|delta_A|), which better captures instantaneous
drift signal for the kernel.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
